channel.title: Cognitive-Bias on Clear Signals
channel.description: Recent content in Cognitive-Bias on Clear Signals

item.title: Anchoring Bias: How the First Number You See Controls Your Wallet
item.description: You walk into a store and see a jacket priced at $500. You keep browsing and find another jacket for $200. It feels like a bargain, right? But step back for a moment.
